summary:
Failed (routing_404): TEST FAILURE

The sign-in page was inspected but the GitHub OAuth button was not found, so the GitHub OAuth redirect could not be verified.

Observations:
- The sign-in page loaded at URL containing '/king2/auth/signin'.
- A Google OAuth button labeled 'تسجيل الدخول بـ Google' is visible and was verified to redirect to accounts.google.com.
- No visible or clickable 'تسجيل الدخول بـ GitHub' (Sign in with GitHub) button was found in the page interactive elements or screensho…
